abort.already_configured: A channel with this name is already configured

user.title: Add a PocketNotifier channel
user.description: Each channel maps to one PocketNotifier API key and is exposed as its own notify action, for example notify.living_room.

data_description.name: Used to build the service name, e.g. "Living Room" becomes notify.living_room.
data_description.api_key: The PocketNotifier API key for this channel. It is not validated now — delivery failures are logged when a notification is sent.
